page_content:
Math Courses for the CCJS LEP Gateway Requirements

Select one of the following: 3

MATH107

Introduction to Math Modeling and Probability

(formerly MATH111)

STAT100

Elementary Statistics and Probability

Total Credits

1 Two CCJS Courses of Choice must be at the 400 level

2 i.e., CCJS325, CCJS360, CCJS418

3 A calculus class, MATH120 (formerly MATH220), MATH130 or MATH140, with a grade of C- or higher may be substituted

Please keep the following information in mind:

• No grade lower than a C- may be used toward the major

• Students must achieve a combined grade point average of a 2.0 in the CCJS major
